title: Heteropterys ovata

The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various ailments such as fever, digestive issues, and skin conditions. The order Malpighiales is a member of the clade Rosid, a large group of flowering plants that also includes the families Rosaceae and Celastraceae.
